step_title: explicit ambiguous auth rejection in get_current_actor
summary: 在 api/v1/deps.py 的 get_current_actor() 增加双凭据短路拒绝：若同一请求同时携带 agent 与 admin 凭据，则返回 400 ambiguous_auth_credentials。单独 agent/admin 路径保持不变。
blocker: structural validation: dual-credential rejection precedes existing agent/admin branches; code=ambiguous_auth_credentials; status_code=400; single-credential branches remain present
